name: Effluent licence
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: EMA licence for enterprises discharging effluent, with quarterly waste-management reporting for licensed industrial dischargers.

name: ESIA certificate
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Environmental and Social Impact Assessment certificate issued by EMA, required before implementing projects in EMA-listed categories.

name: POBS
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: NSSA's Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme, to which employers, including farm employers, remit monthly contributions.

name: Enterprise (farm accounting)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A distinct production activity (for example maize, broilers, dairy) to which revenue and costs are allocated for gross-margin analysis.

name: Offtake agreement
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A contract where a buyer commits to purchase future production, often with input support and price or deduction terms.

name: Contract farming / outgrower scheme
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Production under contract to a sponsor who typically supplies inputs and recovers their cost from deliveries.

name: Inputs scheme
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An arrangement supplying seed, fertiliser or chemicals on credit against future deliveries.

name: A1 / A2 farms
notes: Common usage of land-reform terminology recorded for product design; the official model definitions were not verified from an official source in this revision.
definition: Common shorthand for Zimbabwe's smallholder (A1) and medium/large-scale (A2) resettlement farm models.

name: Communal area farming
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Smallholder production on communal land under traditional tenure.

name: DOC (day-old chicks)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Day-old chicks purchased as the starting point of a broiler or layer batch.

name: Dipping
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Routine immersion or spraying of livestock for tick control; a recurring herd-management activity.

name: Auction floor
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A licensed marketplace where crops such as tobacco are sold by auction; licensing is a declared research gap in this seed.

name: Grading
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Sorting produce into quality classes that determine price; grade attributes should follow the product record.
